item.title: Send Bulk SMS for Android Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Send Bulk SMS for Android Mobile [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Send Bulk SMS for Android Mobile
(Chat & Messenging)
Reliable Bulk SMS for Android Mobiles is used in airlines, railways, government sectors, educational institute, hotel and resorts to convey event alert notifications from computer system to mobile numbers without internet connectivity. Visit company website www.sendbulksms.org and install bulk SMS sender tool that provides fast sending of group text messages from PC to cell phones in few mouse movements in simplified way. Powerful bulk SMS program saves sent messages in txt, xls and html format for future reverences.

[read more]

item.title: Restore Deleted Files Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Deleted Files Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Deleted Files Software
(Utilities)
Image recovery application is fully featured to restore corrupted images, text files and official documents vanishes caused by virus attack or corrupted media in very less time duration. Restore Deleted Files Software is capable to regain formatted audio and video files after disk formation process or hardware/software error. File recover tool is able to revive missing important documents and text files in few minutes.

[read more]
item.description:

Image recovery application is fully featured to restore corrupted images, text files and official documents vanishes caused by virus attack or corrupted media in very less time duration. Restore Deleted Files Software is capable to regain formatted audio and video files after disk formation process or hardware/software error. File recover tool is able to revive missing important documents and text files in few minutes.

[read more]

Restore Deleted Files Software
(Utilities)
Image recovery application is fully featured to restore corrupted images, text files and official documents vanishes caused by virus attack or corrupted media in very less time duration. Restore Deleted Files Software is capable to regain formatted audio and video files after disk formation process or hardware/software error. File recover tool is able to revive missing important documents and text files in few minutes.

[read more]

item.title: Android SMS Sender Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android SMS Sender Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Android SMS Sender Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Android SMS Application is effective and useful software to send bulk mobile sms from your PC to numerous phone contact number by using Android mobile devices at a time in English or non English languages. Android sms messenger provides facility to send text messages from computer to several contact numbers over worldwide mobile network without using any internet relationship, in a single mouse click. Software provides phone messaging application to download exclusive of any monthly charges and buried arraign, paid one time and utilize existence instance. Android sms application provide facility to view and save all sent bulk sms in format of Excel or Text files and extra ordinary feature to remove duplicate cell phone numbers from list of contact numbers. Android sms program supports all major type mobile brand like Sony Ericson, Motorola, Nokia, LG, Samsung, Vodafone, Reliance etc supported with all main type of Microsoft Windows like Windows 11, Windows 10, 8, 7, Windows Vista. Android bulk sms software provides cheaper and time consuming communication surroundings like quick notification, job alerts, office oleaginous, meeting alert for employees, examination result alert for students, quick notification, office colleagues, job alerts, social organizations and business promotion.Extraordinary feature of software:-*Android SMS Application, software send to mobile text message worldwide to any mobile network in Unicode language from stand computer system, in one mouse click.*Provide facility to save and view all sent phone numbers in computer or phone memory in Excel or Text file format and helps in removing duplicate phone numbers from list of contact numbers.*Provide exceptional graphical user interface so no industrial skills are required to operate software.

[read more]
item.description:
Android SMS Sender Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Android SMS Application is effective and useful software to send bulk mobile sms from your PC to numerous phone contact number by using Android mobile devices at a time in English or non English languages. Android sms program supports all major type mobile brand like Sony Ericson, Motorola, Nokia, LG, Samsung, Vodafone, Reliance etc supported with all main type of Microsoft Windows like Windows 11, Windows 10, 8, 7, Windows Vista. [read more]

Android SMS Application is effective and useful software to send bulk mobile sms from your PC to numerous phone contact number by using Android mobile devices at a time in English or non English languages. Android sms application provide facility to view and save all sent bulk sms in format of Excel or Text files and extra ordinary feature to remove duplicate cell phone numbers from list of contact numbers. Android sms program supports all major type mobile brand like Sony Ericson, Motorola, Nokia, LG, Samsung, Vodafone, Reliance etc supported with all main type of Microsoft Windows like Windows 11, Windows 10, 8, 7, Windows Vista. Android bulk sms software provides cheaper and time consuming communication surroundings like quick notification, job alerts, office oleaginous, meeting alert for employees, examination result alert for students, quick notification, office colleagues, job alerts, social organizations and business promotion.Extraordinary feature of software:-*Android SMS Application, software send to mobile text message worldwide to any mobile network in Unicode language from stand computer system, in one mouse click.*Provide facility to save and view all sent phone numbers in computer or phone memory in Excel or Text file format and helps in removing duplicate phone numbers from list of contact numbers.*Provide exceptional graphical user interface so no industrial skills are required to operate software.

item.title: Restore SIM Card Messages [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore SIM Card Messages [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore SIM Card Messages
(Utilities)
Want to Restore SIM Card Messages previously deleted or lost form your mobile phone inbox, outbox folder with the help of SIM card data recovery software which is freely available on website www.restoredeletedfiles.org which facilitates you to rescue your entire mobile phone contact numbers from your phonebook memory storage. Program enables generate reports of SIM card information like IMEI number, name, Location etc.

[read more]

item.title: USB Drive Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Files Restore
(Utilities)
Lost all your official files and folders from pen drive storage due to some virus attack or hardware failure and want to retrieve them in same format, download USB Drive Files Restore software from developer's website www.restoredeletedfiles.org which simply scan corrupted drive and restore damaged multimedia documents such as pictures, images, audio, video clips without any type of degradation in data quality occurs at any specified location on your computer system.

[read more]

item.title: Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
GUI based Android Mobile Bulk SMS Software provides best solution for increasing business sale, mobile marketing etc by sending unlimited text messages to many mobile users. Professional text sms sender application helps users to forward bulk text notification, alerts, messages, reminder etc from android technology based mobile phone within few minutes. Expert text sms sender application supports various text formats like txt, html, xls etc to compose customized text messages.

[read more]

item.title: Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition
(Utilities)
Looking for video rescue tool to regain formatted clip from disk drive? Not get appropriate solution! Don't tensed just visit www.restoredeletedfiles.org site that offers Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition software to revive missed document, file, folder, images from FAT16, FAT32 based partitioned hard disk. FAT pics rescue utility having user interactive graphical interface and having capability to retrieve missed data from device even “drive not detected” error message display on computer screen.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Looking for video rescue tool to regain formatted clip from disk drive? Not get appropriate solution! Don't tensed just visit www.restoredeletedfiles.org site that offers Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition software to revive missed document, file, folder, images from FAT16, FAT32 based partitioned hard disk. FAT pics rescue utility having user interactive graphical interface and having capability to retrieve missed data from device even “drive not detected” error message display on computer screen.

[read more]

(Utilities)
Looking for video rescue tool to regain formatted clip from disk drive? Not get appropriate solution! Don't tensed just visit www.restoredeletedfiles.org site that offers Restore Deleted Files Fat Partition software to revive missed document, file, folder, images from FAT16, FAT32 based partitioned hard disk. FAT pics rescue utility having user interactive graphical interface and having capability to retrieve missed data from device even “drive not detected” error message display on computer screen.

[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]

item.title: Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Windows 11 Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.
1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu
3. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
4. Auto Detect Icons
5. Responsive
6. Light


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
1. Open Terminal and type : Bash install.sh
2. Add Windong11-Button to Panel

[read more]
